display_information.name: FaultMaven (Dev)
display_information.description: AI troubleshooting copilot that runs the investigation, not just answers.
display_information.long_description: Socket Mode development variant of FaultMaven. Create a SEPARATE Slack app from this manifest for local testing (SLACK_TRANSPORT=socket) — you cannot Socket-connect to the same app that the hosted HTTP/OAuth build serves. The production manifest is manifest.json.

assistant_view.assistant_description: I find a problem's root cause the way a seasoned engineer would — triage, hypotheses, targeted evidence, a verified fix — grounded in your logs, errors, configs, runbooks, and past fixes. You approve and execute; you stay in control.

shortcuts.name: Ask
shortcuts.description: Open an investigation seeded with this message
